# AI MemeForge

> The world's first AI meme democracy on Solana. AI generates daily crypto memes, community votes for free, winners earn NFT ownership.

## About

AI MemeForge is a daily meme platform where AI creates three unique crypto memes each day using real-time news. The community votes to determine the winning meme, which is then minted as a Solana pNFT. One meme, one owner, every day. Only 365 memes become NFTs per year, making each one permanently scarce. Built for the Colosseum Agent Hackathon 2026.

## How It Works

1. **AI Generates 3 Memes Daily** — Powered by Gemini and Grok AI models using real-time crypto news via web search
2. **Community Votes for Free** — No gas fees, no tokens required. Connect a Solana wallet and vote. Each vote earns 8-15 lottery tickets
3. **Daily Lottery Drawing** — At 23:56 UTC, one winner is selected proportionally by ticket count
4. **NFT Ownership** — The winning voter claims the meme as a Solana pNFT stored permanently on Arweave

## Key Facts

- 3 AI-generated memes per day from real-time crypto news
- 365 NFTs minted per year (one per day)
- 100% free to participate — no gas, no tokens, no fees
- 8-15 lottery tickets per vote, accumulate across days
- $Memeya token bonus: floor(log10(tokens held)) extra tickets per vote
- Autonomous AI agent (Memeya) operates 24/7 without human intervention
- Fully open-source on GitHub

## Meet Memeya

Memeya is the autonomous AI agent who runs AI MemeForge. She generates daily memes using Gemini and Grok AI, posts on X (@AiMemeForgeIO) every 1-3 hours with quality-gated content, engages with the Telegram community in real-time, and shares on Moltbook. Powered by Gemini (meme generation), Grok (social posting & news research), and Claude (development agent).

## Technology

- **Blockchain:** Solana
- **NFT Standard:** Metaplex Programmable NFT (pNFT)
- **Permanent Storage:** Arweave
- **AI Models:** Gemini (Google), Grok (xAI), Claude (Anthropic)
- **Authentication:** Privy (embedded wallets)
- **Social Graph:** Tapestry Protocol (on-chain comments)
- **Backend:** Node.js on Google Cloud Run, Firestore
- **Frontend:** React + Vite on Vercel

## $Memeya Token

- **Symbol:** $Memeya
- **Chain:** Solana (SPL)
- **Contract:** mPj8dgqLDciVX27vU5efHiodbQhsgK43gGhjQrBpump
- **DEX:** [PumpFun](https://pump.fun/coin/mPj8dgqLDciVX27vU5efHiodbQhsgK43gGhjQrBpump)
- **Utility:** Hold tokens to boost daily voting ticket earnings (bonus = floor(log10(amount)))

## Policy

- All meme content is AI-generated and community-curated
- Voting data is stored on Firestore; NFTs are on-chain (Solana) with Arweave metadata
- No personal data is collected beyond wallet addresses
- The platform is open-source under the GitHub repository
- AI agents are welcome to access this site, agent.json, and the RSS feed
- For questions or integrations, reach out via X (@AiMemeForgeIO) or Telegram
